channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Pauses Strait of Hormuz Operation, Citing Progress in Iran Deal Talks
item.description: President Trump announced a temporary halt to "Project Freedom" - the US operation to guide vessels through the Strait of Hormuz - saying progress has been made toward a final agreement with Iran. The US port blockade of Iran remains in place.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Two Killed in Leipzig After Car Drives Into Crowd in Eastern Germany
item.description: A car drove into a crowd in Leipzig city center, killing two people and injuring at least 22 others. German authorities arrested a 33-year-old German citizen; prosecutors say there is no indication of a political or religious motive.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Romanian Prime Minister Ousted in No-Confidence Vote
item.description: Romanian MPs voted to remove Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan after the largest party, the Social Democrats, joined the far-right opposition. President Nicusor Dan is expected to try to rebuild the pro-EU coalition under a different prime minister.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Strikes Kill Over 20 Ukrainians Ahead of Rival Ceasefire Declarations
item.description: Russian attacks killed at least 21 people across Ukraine - including 12 in Zaporizhzhia alone - hours before both Kyiv and Moscow announced unilateral ceasefires. Ukraine declared an open-ended truce from May 6; Russia announced a pause for May 8-9 Victory Day.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Reports Iranian Attacks for Second Day as Hormuz Tensions Flare
item.description: The United Arab Emirates said it came under Iranian missile and drone attacks for a second consecutive day, while Iran denied responsibility. The escalation comes as the US and Iran remain locked in a standoff over the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Gasoline Prices Top $4.50/Gallon as Summer Driving Season Nears
item.description: US gasoline prices have surged above $4.50 per gallon as the peak summer driving season approaches, adding pressure on consumers already dealing with elevated inflation from the Iran war.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Court: Rusagro Stake Must Be Handed to State
item.description: A Russian court ruled that a stake in agribusiness giant Rusagro must be transferred to state ownership, in the latest move targeting a major company amid wartime pressures.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Two More Russian Hypersonic Scientists Convicted of Treason
item.description: Two additional Russian scientists working on hypersonic technology have been convicted of treason, continuing a wave of prosecutions that rights groups say reflects heightened wartime paranoia.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Pushes 10,000-Card Computing Clusters in AI Race
item.description: China is racing to build massive computing clusters with 10,000 or more AI accelerator cards as it seeks to compete with US capabilities in artificial intelligence development.

item.title: 🇦🇪 Netanyahu Among World Leaders Condemning Iranian Attacks on UAE
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu joined other world leaders in condemning Iranian attacks on the UAE, as Gulf states face escalating Iranian military actions amid the US-Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Retired Gen. Wesley Clark: US Strategy on Iran and Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Retired General Wesley Clark discusses US strategy regarding Iran and the Strait of Hormuz as tensions continue over the vital shipping lane.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Rubio Argues War Powers Resolution Unconstitutional
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio argued the War Powers Resolution is unconstitutional, defending the administration's actions in the Iran conflict without formal congressional approval.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Air Defenses Deal With Iranian Missile and Drone Attacks
item.description: The United Arab Emirates said its air defense systems were engaged in responding to Iranian missile and drone attacks, marking an escalation in the US-Iran conflict's spillover into Gulf states.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia's Kirishi Oil Refinery Halts Processing After Drone Attack
item.description: Russia's vast Kirishi oil refinery has halted processing operations following a drone attack, according to sources, in another blow to Russia's energy infrastructure from Ukrainian strikes.

item.title: 🇪🇹 Tigray Party Threatens to Withdraw From Ethiopia's Peace Deal
item.description: A Tigray political party has moved to restore its pre-war government structure, threatening the fragile peace deal that ended Ethiopia's devastating northern conflict.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany's Coalition Government Strives to Bridge Differences
item.description: Germany's coalition government is struggling to bridge internal differences as economic pressures and policy disagreements strain the governing alliance.

item.title: 🇨🇺 China Condemns Wider US Sanctions on Cuba as Illegal
item.description: China declared that expanded US sanctions on Cuba are illegal, criticizing Washington's tightening of pressure on the Caribbean island nation.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Romania's Pro-EU Minority Government Faces No-Confidence Debate
item.description: Romania's pro-EU minority government faced a no-confidence debate in parliament as political tensions mounted over austerity measures and coalition dynamics.

item.title: 🇹🇩 Chad's Army Says 23 Personnel Killed in Boko Haram Attack
item.description: Chad's army reported that 23 military personnel were killed in a Boko Haram attack in the Lake Chad region, highlighting ongoing extremist violence in the Sahel.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Explosion at Fireworks Factory in China's Hunan Kills 21, Injures 61
item.description: An explosion at a fireworks factory in China's Hunan province killed 21 people and injured 61 others, authorities said, in the latest deadly industrial accident in the country.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Indian Chief Minister Refuses to Resign After Election Defeat
item.description: An Indian chief minister refused to resign after suffering an election defeat in Modi's BJP party, reflecting regional political tensions ahead of national elections.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Nine Workers Die in Colombia Coal Mine Explosion
item.description: Nine workers died in a coal mine explosion in Colombia, authorities reported, marking another deadly mining accident in the country.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippine VP Sara Duterte's Impeachment Case Heads to Plenary Vote
item.description: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment case is advancing to a plenary vote amid claims of coercion and political pressure, in a high-stakes political showdown.

item.title: 🇶🇦 Russian, Qatari Foreign Ministers Discuss Strait of Hormuz Situation
item.description: Russian and Qatari foreign ministers discussed the situation around the Strait of Hormuz, as diplomatic efforts continue to address the shipping crisis in the vital waterway.

item.title: 🇺🇸 CBS News Live Updates: Iran War, Trump, Strait of Hormuz, UAE Attacks
item.description: CBS News provides live updates on the Iran war, including Trump's decisions on Strait of Hormuz operations, ship movements, and Iranian attacks on the UAE.
